vibe: Professional, authoritative, trustworthy, clear. Enterprise-grade IT asset recovery.

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing: p-6 to p-12 for standard sections, py-20 for major structural sections.
layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid (Bento style). Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetric distribution.
layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout.header: Crystal Glassmorphism over content (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with a 1px delicate inner stroke, OR solid white with border-b. Ensure z-50.
layout.footer: Dark mode footer (bg-primary) with massive spacing (py-24) to create contrast shift from light body.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces with subtle border-border/40, no heavy drop shadows default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.buttons: Primary CTA uses Accent (#10B981) for high visibility on valuation/sell actions. Secondary uses Primary (#0B1B3D). Sharp or max 8px rounded corners.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Never use native inputs. Require generous padding and clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent).
components.animations: Hover states on interactive elements. Smooth transitions (transition-all duration-200). Subtle entrance staggering for feature bento grids.

images.description: Server rack / IT infrastructure, to be used in the background of the hero section with a gradient overlay (bg-white/70 or white-to-transparent) to ensure text contrast.
Close-up of server racks for 'Sell Your IT Equipment' sections.
Office laptops showing corporate IT usage, suitable for 'What We Buy' or asset category catalog.
Business professionals meeting, representing fair valuation, trust, and enterprise relationships.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA minimums. White text on primary navy, dark text on white/gray.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='get-quote-button').

icons_and_assets.usage: Use crisp, stroke-based icons for enterprise clarity. Stroke width 1.5.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors like slate or blue if they conflict with the specified hex values.
Use Manrope for headings and Inter for body text. DO NOT use Inter for headings.
Construct the multi-step Quotation Lead Form using Shadcn primitives (Form, Input, Select, FileUpload simulation).
Implement the 'Interactive Valuation Calculator' with clear typography and the Accent green for the final value.
For the Admin Dashboard, switch layout to 'Control Room Grid', maximizing data density with Shadcn tables and charts.
Ensure the hero image has an overlay that does not exceed 50% opacity, allowing the IT infrastructure to be visible but keeping the H1 highly legible.
Add data-testid to every clickable element.
